meaning: vt.欺骗,哄骗,欺瞒vi.使用欺骗诡诈手段
examples: Finagle a day off from work.
Figures in science are believed to have used the finagle factor.
All this is important because the finagle factor is still at work.
Occasionally well-known startup COOs or heads of engineering finagle their way into this position.
Mutual funds with no business in Apple today finagle a way to justify buying those shares.
